statusTrace:

    @allure.story("查询游戏社区剩余语音房数量")
    @allure.title("【场景】TC-VOICE-002 查询游戏社区剩余可创建语音房数量")
    @pytest.mark.P1
    def test_query_game_community_voice_room_remain(self, community_api):
        """查询游戏社区剩余可创建语音房数量"""
        data = TEST_DATA["community_flow"]
        community = data["community"]
    
        with allure.step("查询游戏社区剩余语音房数量"):
            resp = community_api.query_personal_server_topic_channel_num(
                group_id=community["game_group_id"],
                server_type=community["game_server_type"],
                channel_type=data["channel_type"]["voice_room"],
                server_id=community["game_server_id"],
            )
            result = assert_response_success(resp)
            _assert_ret_code_100(result, "查询游戏社区语音房数量")
    
        with allure.step("验证返回的剩余数量>=0"):
            assert_field_exists(result, "retData", "返回数据不存在")
>           remain = result["retData"].get("remainNum", result["retData"].get("remainChannelNum", 0))
E           AttributeError: 'int' object has no attribute 'get'

cases\nnchannel\test_community_flow_case.py:93: AttributeError
